summary: The diff implements most of the requested features: per-category report sections (REQ-1), a total finance summary (REQ-2), PDF export (REQ-3), Excel/CSV export (REQ-4), editable entries via SpendingDialog (REQ-5), and print-optimized layouts (REQ-6). One notable gap is that the 'Export Excel' functionality produces CSV files rather than true .xlsx files, which partially misses REQ-4's acceptance criteria. All other requirements appear substantially implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add Excel (.xlsx) export functionality to each individual category report and to the Total Finance Summary. Clicking 'Export Excel' downloads a properly formatted .xlsx file with columns for date, description, category, and amount.
missing_requirements.reason: The implementation in reportExport.ts uses downloadCSV() to generate .csv files (MIME type 'text/csv') rather than true .xlsx files. The acceptance criteria explicitly require a .xlsx file format, not CSV.

hallucinated_features.description: Misc Expenses tab with full CRUD (add, update, delete) for MiscExpense entries on the Finance page
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a separate Misc Expenses tab with its own CRUD operations beyond what already existed; the diff adds a dedicated 'Misc Expenses' tab with add/edit/delete dialogs and corresponding mutation hooks that were not part of any REQ.
